verses.text: Amaziah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmnihlenga pha a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnihlekua sung uk hi. Ama nu' min Jehoaddan hi a, Jerusalem khuami ahi hi
Topa' mitah a manin amah gamta a, ahi zongin a lungsim a paubaanglo hizo nai samlo hi
Ama khutsungah kumpi vangliatna kiptakin a om khit phetin a pa ahi kumpipa a that a nasemte a that hi
Ahih hangin Moses laibu sungah, “Tate' hangin pate kithatlo ding a, pate' hangin tate kithat lo ding hi,” ci-in Topa in a thupiakna thukham sungah a kigelh mah bangin amah in amau' tate thatlo hi

Tua ciangin Amaziah in Judah mite khawm a, a tul-a ukte leh a za-a ukte' khutnuai-ah Judah mite leh Benjamin mite a behbeh, a pawlpawlin a koih hi. Amah in kum sawmnih leh a tungsiah a pha mite khawm a, galsim dingin a hoih, teipi leh lum a zang thei, a kitengkhia mihing tul za thum a pha hi
Amah in Israel sung panin ngun talen za khat tawh a thahat galhang mi tul za khat zong a cial hi
Ahih hangin Pasian' mi khat ama kiangah hong pai-in, “Kumpipa aw, Israel mi ahi hih Efraim mite khempeuh, Topa in ompih lo ahih manin hih Israel galkapte nang tawh kuankhawm sak kei in

Ahih hangin hih bang lama hihna tawh galdona-ah thahat dingin kingaihsun kha na hih leh, Pasian in galte' mai-ah nang hong paii ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in huhna ding ahi a, paihna ding ahi zongin vangliatna nei hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Amaziah in Pasian' mipa kiangah, “Ahi ta zongin Israel galkapte tungah ka piaksa talen za khat thu bang cih ding ihi hiam?” a ci hi. Pasian' mipa in dawngin, “ Topa in hih sangin nakpi takin a tamzaw hong pia thei hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Amaziah in Efraim panin hong pai galkapte, inn-ah a ciahkik dingin a paikhiasak hi. Tua ciangin Judah mite tungah amaute heh mahmah uh a, heh mahmahna tawh inn-ah a ciahkik uh hi
Ahih hangin Amaziah kihanthawnin a mite paikhiatpih a, Ci Kuam-ah pai-in Seir gam mite mihing tul sawm a that hi
Adang tul sawm hingmat uh a, keen sang dawn khatah amaute paipihin tua keen dawn panin amaute lawnsuk uh a, amaute khempeuh themlen' hi
Ahih hangin Amaziah in gal sungah amah tawh kuansak loin, inn-ah a sawlkik galkapte in Samaria panin Bethhoron dong Judah khuapite na sim uh a, tuate sungah mi tul thum thatin van tampi a la uh hi
Seir gamah Edom mite a thahna panin Amaziah hong ciah ciangin amah in Seir gam mite' pasian-te hong ciahpih a, ama pasian dingin tuate koih a, tuate bia-in tuate' tungah biakna a pia hi
Tua ciangin Amaziah tungah Topa hehin ama kiangah kamsang khat sawl a, tuapa in, “Bang hangin nangma khut panin ama mite a honkhialo, mi pawlkhatte' pasian-te beel na hi hiam?” a ci hi

Ahih hangin amah in thu a gen laitakin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Kumpipa tungah ngaihsutna a pia dingin nang hong koih ka hi uh hiam? Khawl in! Bang hangin nang hong kithat ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin kamsangpa khawl a, ahih hangin ama kiangah, “Hih bang gamta-in ka thugenna ngailo na hih manin Pasian in nang hong suksiat ding a lungsim a khentatna ka thei hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Judah kumpi Amaziah in ngaihsutna a lak khit ciangin Israel kumpi, Jehu' tapa Jehoahaz, a tapa Joash kiangah mi sawlin, “Hong pai in; khatlekhat kisi ni,” cisak hi

Tua ciangin Israel kumpi Joash in Judah kumpi Amaziah kiangah thu puak a, “Lebanon-a thangling kung in Lebanon-a taamtak tungah thu puak a, ‘A zi dingin ka tapa' tungah na tanu pia in,’ ci hi. Tua ciangin Lebanon gamsa khat hong pai-in thangling kung tuancil hi

Nangmah in, ‘Edom mite ka vat khin hi,’ na ci a, na lungsim in nang hong kisathei sak hi. Tu-a na minthan'na zah tawh inn-ah om in; bang hangin nangmah leh Judah mite na pukkhawmna dingun buaina piangsak ding na hi hiam” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Amaziah in manglo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Edom pasian-te bia uh ahih manin, Pasian in amau' galte' khutsungah amaute a piaktheihna dingin tua pen Pasian' vaihawmna ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel kumpipa Joash kuanto a, Judah-te' gam Bethshemesh-ah amah leh Judah kumpipa Amaziah khatlekhat gal sungah kisi uh hi
Tua ciangin Israel mite in Judah mite zo a, mi khempeuh a inn uhah a tai uh hi

Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa Joash in Bethshemesh-ah Ahaziah' tapa Joash, a tapa Amaziah ahi Judah kumpipa manin Jerusalem-ah paipih a, Efraim Kongpi panin a Kiu Kulhpi ciangdong pi za guk sung Jerusalem kulh a phelkhia hi

Tua ciangin amah in kham leh ngun khempeuh, leh Pasian' biakinn sungah a kimu umlebeel khempeuhte tawh Obededom mankhawm hi. Amah in kumpipa' inn-a vanmanphate la-in luang khapna ding mite zong man a, tua ciangin Samaria-ah a ciahkik hi
Israel kumpi, Jehoahaz' tapa Joash a sih zawh Judah kumpi Joash' tapa Amaziah kum sawmlenga sung hinglai hi
Tu-in Amaziah' nasep a omlaite, a patna panin a tawpna dong, Judah leh Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi

Topa kiang panin amah a kihei khiata kipanin amaute in amah sawmsimna khat Jerusalem-ah nei uh ahih ciangin Lakhish-ah amah tai hi. Ahih hangin amaute in Lakhish-ah amah nungdelh sak uh a, tua lai-ah amah that uh hi
Tua ciangin sakolte tungah amah pua-in kiciahpih a, David khuapi sungah a pate tawh kivui hi.
